notableEvents.label: Felix Reyes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Felix Reyes grounds into a double play, pitcher Max Meyer to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Connor Norby. Garrett Stubbs out at 2nd. Felix Reyes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Edmundo Sosa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Edmundo Sosa lines out to first baseman Connor Norby.
